response.justification: Critical mismatch on mandatory requirements. The role requires 5–10 years of professional C++ development on Windows with SQL Server/Oracle experience; this candidate has ~6 months of professional C++ (2014–2015), no Windows platform emphasis, and MongoDB-centric database background. Additionally, there is no demonstrated fixed-income derivatives or capital-markets domain expertise—only a vague mention of 'investment practices' at a fintech startup. The candidate's strengths lie in modern web/cloud development (TypeScript, Node.js, Kubernetes, AWS), which is orthogonal to the financial-services Windows C++ systems required.
strengths: Proven software craftsmanship with 15+ years experience, strong TDD and testing discipline, and clear communication skills demonstrated through talks and open-source leadership
Demonstrated ability to quickly learn new languages and domains, with proficiency across C, C++, Java, D, and infrastructure tooling (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second, showing capability with performance-critical code
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (Dec 2014–June 2015), far below the 5–10 year mandatory requirement; career is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and D instead
No evidence of Windows platform development or SQL Server/Oracle expertise; recent 10 years focus on Linux, cloud (AWS CDK), and MongoDB, not the Windows SQL ecosystem required
No fixed-income derivatives, investment banking, or capital-markets domain experience; mention of 'investment practices' at RIDE Capital is vague and likely refers to fintech, not trading systems

key_factors.factor: Windows platform and SQL Server/Oracle expertise
